Use of Moment of force =퐹퐹퐹퐹 Use of principle of moments with dish in original position Uses total weight = weight of rice + weight of dish to determine weight of one portion of rice Use of principle of moments with dish in new position Or Calculates clockwise moment with 3 portions of rice in new position and calculates anticlockwise moment of weight of beam Dish contains 8.2 portions of rice Comparison with 3 portions and consistent conclusion Example calculation Moment of weight of beam = 3.1 N × 0.08 m = 0.248 N m 0.248 N m = (weight of dish and rice) × 0.25 m Weight of dish and rice= 0.248 N m 0.25 m = 0.992 N Weight of one portion of rice = 0.992 N – 0.64 N = 0.352 N 0.248 N m = (portions × 0.352 N + 0.64 N) × 0.07 m Number of portions = 0.248 N m 0.07 −0.64 N 0.352 N = 8.247 The dish contains 8.2 portions, not 3 portions of rice (1) (1) (1) (1) (1) (1) Total for question 16 8 Number Answer Mark
